vulnerability.name: GO-2022-0635
vulnerability.description: In-band key negotiation issue in AWS S3 Crypto SDK for golang. Affected symbols: github.com/aws/aws-sdk-go/service/s3/s3crypto NewDecryptionClient, NewEncryptionClient.

statements.impact_statement: github.com/aws/aws-sdk-go is required transitively by github.com/pulumi/pulumi/pkg/v3/operations. Neither this codebase nor Pulumi's operations package imports github.com/aws/aws-sdk-go/service/s3/s3crypto. govulncheck -mode=source ./... reports 0 reachable vulnerabilities (and explicitly identifies these two advisories as 'vulnerabilities in modules you require, but your code doesn't appear to call these vulnerabilities').

vulnerability.name: GO-2022-0646
vulnerability.description: CBC padding oracle issue in AWS S3 Crypto SDK for golang. Affected symbols: github.com/aws/aws-sdk-go/service/s3/s3crypto NewDecryptionClient, NewEncryptionClient.

statements.impact_statement: Same as GO-2022-0635 — s3crypto subpackage is not imported by this codebase or by any code path Pulumi's operations package reaches. govulncheck reachability scan confirms zero reachable calls to the affected symbols.
